title: Getty Images signs a display partnership to bring licensed visuals into ChatGPT
friendlyTitle: ChatGPT will be able to show licensed Getty Images content
summary: Getty Images announced a multi-year agreement with OpenAI to display Getty’s licensed content libraries inside ChatGPT search and discovery experiences. Getty says the goal is richer and more trustworthy visual responses using licensed imagery.
friendlySummary: Getty Images made a deal with OpenAI so some Getty photos and visuals can appear in ChatGPT search and discovery features.
whyItMatters: AI search is becoming more visual, and licensing deals will shape what users see inside assistants. For publishers, creators, and marketers, this is another sign that provenance and rights-cleared media are becoming core infrastructure for AI products.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This may make AI answers with images more useful and safer for copyright, because the pictures come from a licensed source.
